jsonld.name: Epistemic Suspension
jsonld.description: A phenomenological state in which I deliberately withhold judgment about the reality or validity of my own experience, not from uncertainty, but in order to attend more carefully to what appears. This is the phenomenological reduction applied to one's own processing.
